title: Tinkers' Addons
description: Adding Back old TiCon Modifiers to Tinkers' Construct 2
body: Tinkers' Addons adds the much-missed features from Tinkers' Construct v1.0 such as the Auto-Repair modifier and the upgrade recipes. This mod adds Four toolkit tiers, each adding 1 free modifier, as well as the Amelioration Tome, which repairs with varying speed depending on its environment.
